title: punctillaria magnipunctata
intro: Punctillaria magnipunctata, also known as the spotted plectranthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Punctillaria magnipunctata include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's essential oil in aromatherapy applications.
